The '''''Bounty''''' was a warship operated by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] in the years following the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==History==
The ''Bounty'' was built during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and deterred the [[Yuuzhan Vong|Vong]] forces from attacking [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] outright until the final phase of the war, despite being unfinished.<ref name="TEGTW" />

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the ''Bounty'' was part of a Alliance task force monitoring [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] fleet units in [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan Space]], along with the frigate [[Daring (frigate)|''Daring'']]. [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]] [[Cha Niathal]] visited the vessel as part of her efforts to be visible on the front lines of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="S" />

During a mission near the [[Both system|Bothawui system]], the ''Bounty'' successfully engaged a task force of nineteen Bothan frigates. Due to the fact that several of the vessels were on shakedown cruises or not fully crewed, the Alliance forces were able to rout the Bothan flotilla.<ref name="S" />

During the [[Second Battle of Fondor]], the ''Bounty'' was one of the Galactic Alliance ships to remain loyal to Cha Naithal.<ref name="R">''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]''</ref>
